text:
- Add KDE support (unfortunatly uses a kludge due to bsd.kde.mk only being
  included when bsd.port.pre.mk is included)
- Fix pkg-plist to be in correct order
- Correct OPTIONS handling (this includes Gnome support needs GTK, Metacity requires Gnome)

Port maintainer (rnoland@2hip.net) is cc'd.
